description_long: This is a large, detached residential house set within a fenced lot, featuring a prominent front entrance with a double-door and a paved driveway leading to a separate garage. The house has a complex roofline with multiple gable sections and a mix of blue and dark gray roofing materials. The front yard is landscaped with tall, narrow shrubs, flowering trees, and a manicured lawn, while the backyard is more open and bordered by a wooden fence. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on the main facade, with additional windows on the sides and rear, providing ample natural light. The main entryway is accentuated by a small porch with columns and a short set of steps, giving the house a stately appearance. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with clean lines and a balanced layout.
description: A large, detached house with a complex gable roof, symmetrical windows, a prominent front entrance, and landscaped front and back yards within a fenced lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with double doors, symmetrical windows, landscaped front yard, and driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the separate garage, extended driveway, and the open backyard area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the fenced backyard with lawn.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side and rear of the house, the garage, and a mix of landscaping elements.
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with small porch, columns, short steps, and decorative landscaping
